concerns.text: Task T032 ('Implement Egger's linear regression test...') lacks a concrete deliverable for the conditional logic required by FR-005. The spec mandates: 'IF N < 10, flag as underpowered; IF N >= 10, run test; IF p<0.10, trigger trim-and-fill'. The task description only mentions 'Flag... if p<0.10' but omits the N<10 check and the explicit trigger for the trim-and-fill algorithm. An implementer cannot deterministically execute this without guessing the N<10 logic or the trigger condition.

Task T033 ('Implement trim-and-fill algorithm...') is not self-contained. FR-005 states this is a sensitivity analysis triggered ONLY if Egger's test p<0.10. The task description does not specify the input condition (the p-value threshold) or the output requirement ('report the adjusted effect size'). Without these, the implementer cannot know when to run it or what specific artifact (adjusted effect size) to produce.

Task T034 ('Implement leave-one-out sensitivity analysis...') fails to include the conditional guard required by FR-006 ('IF N >= 10'). The task description implies unconditional execution. An implementer following this task would run the analysis on datasets with N<10, violating the spec's constraint that it is 'underpowered' in that case. The task must explicitly state: 'Implement logic to check N; if N<10, skip and log; if N>=10, execute...'

Task T012 ('Implement search query builder...') is ambiguous regarding the manual CSV fallback. FR-001 requires the system to 'accept manual CSV exports with the same schema' (specifically: title, abstract, DOI, etc.). The task description mentions 'manual CSV import' but does not explicitly require the implementation of a schema validator for these manual inputs. Without this, the implementer might accept malformed CSVs, causing silent failures downstream.

Task T041 ('Run benchmark comparing meta package output against statsmodels...') is too coarse. It describes a 'Run benchmark' action but does not name the specific artifact produced (e.g., 'Generate `data/derived/benchmark_equivalence_report.json` with mean absolute error < 1e-6'). The downstream atomizer will need to split this into 'Create synthetic dataset', 'Run comparison script', and 'Generate report artifact'.
